issues.description: Action type is 'SearchDeck' but effect searches trash, not deck. Should be 'PlayFromHand' or a trash-search action. Official text: 'Play up to 1 [Ulti] with a cost of 4 or less from your trash.'
Missing filter for card type '[Ulti]'. Current filter only checks cost; must also restrict to Ulti type cards.
Missing 'maxCount' constraint. Effect states 'up to 1', requiring maxCount:1 limit.
